creator: ralph@imada.sdu.dk
text:
lang/gcc42 fails to build with the following error:

/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build/./gcc/xgcc -B/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build/./gcc/ -B/usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd8.0/bin/ -B/usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd8.0/lib/ -isystem /usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd8.0/include -isystem /usr/local/i386-portbld-freebsd8.0/sys-include -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap -I. -Wall -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -O2 -O2 -pipe -march=athlon-mp -fno-strict-aliasing -MT mf-runtime.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/mf-runtime.Tpo -c ../.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/mf-runtime.o
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c: In function '__mf_resolve_single_dynamic':
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c:625: warning: assignment discards qualifiers from pointer target type
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c: In function '__wrap_main':
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c:765: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c:766: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c:767: error: dereferencing pointer to incomplete type
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c: In function '__mf_describe_object':
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c:1706: warning: format '%lu' expects type 'long unsigned int', but argument 14 has type 'time_t'
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c:1729: warning: format '%lu' expects type 'long unsigned int', but argument 3 has type 'time_t'
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c: In function '__mf_violation':
./.././..//gcc-4.2-20080430/libmudflap/mf-runtime.c:1998: warning: format '%lu' expects type 'long unsigned int', but argument 5 has type 'time_t'
gmake[4]: *** [mf-runtime.lo] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd8.0/libmudflap'
gmake[3]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd8.0/libmudflap'
gmake[2]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build/i386-portbld-freebsd8.0/libmudflap'
gmake[1]: *** [all-target-libmudflap] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/lang/gcc42/work/build'
gmake: *** [bootstrap-lean] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/gcc42.

How-To-Repeat: install lang/gcc42 on current
